summary: Comprehensive testing of Iteration 10 features: BookingModal dark theme, button animations (btn-gold, btn-animate, dash-card), Gestione Sito path fix and dark theme, section reorder feature, and mobile CTA bar dark theme. All 13 backend tests passed. All 16 frontend tests passed.

issues: React hydration warnings about span inside option/select - minor warning, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: BACKEND: API root responds (status: ok)
BACKEND: Public website API returns config with section_order
BACKEND: Public services API returns 25+ services
BACKEND: Public operators API returns operators list
BACKEND: Public promotions API returns promotions list
BACKEND: Admin login successful with admin@brunomelito.it
BACKEND: Protected endpoints require authentication (403)
BACKEND: Website config GET/PUT works with section_order persistence
BACKEND: Section reorder saves and persists to API
BACKEND: Gallery API returns gallery items
BACKEND: Reviews API returns reviews
BACKEND: Nav config returns /gestione-sito in dashboard modules
FRONTEND: Public site dark theme (body bg: rgb(11,17,32) = #0B1120)

FRONTEND: BookingModal accordion categories visible with dark styling
FRONTEND: BookingModal animated price counter on 'Scegli data e ora' button (€10)

FRONTEND: Section reorder 'Ripristina ordine predefinito' button resets order

FRONTEND: Success page dark theme verified via code review
critical_code_review_comments: BookingModal.jsx fully converted to dark theme using CSS variables (--bg-card, --bg-elevated, --gold, --text-primary)
Button animation classes properly defined in index.css (btn-gold, btn-animate, btn-glass, dash-card)
Gestione Sito path correctly set to /gestione-sito in navModules.js
Section order feature uses config.section_order array with dynamic sectionMap rendering in WebsitePage.jsx
WebsiteAdminPage.jsx has new 'Ordine Sezioni' tab with up/down arrows and reset functionality
Mobile CTA bar uses rgba(11,17,32,0.95) background with backdrop-blur for dark glass effect
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 fully tested: BookingModal has dark Onyx & Gold theme with accordion services. Button animations via CSS classes (btn-gold, btn-animate, dash-card). Gestione Sito accessible at /gestione-sito with dark theme. New 'Ordine Sezioni' tab allows reordering 7 sections with up/down arrows and reset button. Section order persists to API as config.section_order array. WebsitePage renders sections dynamically based on order. Mobile CTA bar has dark glass effect. Minor React hydration warnings in console but don't affect functionality.
